tweets.text: .@SenWarren All of our assets are invested in a blind trust by the largest financial institutions in broad market indexes. To suggest that individual stocks are being bought or sold, at the discretion of any member of the Trump family, would be a lie and blatantly false. Using a silly example, if you buy the “Schwab 1000,” you will get some exposure to Nvidia - as well as a 1,000 other U.S. companies large- and mid-cap stocks. It’s completely disingenuous to represent anything to the contrary. Please be better than this…
tweets.text_resolved: .@SenWarren All of our assets are invested in a blind trust by the largest financial institutions in broad market indexes. author.description: Executive Vice President of The @Trump Organization. Husband to @LaraLeaTrump. Advocate of @StJude. @WorldLibertyFi @ABTC #MakeAmericaGreatAgain
